project.name: cc-gui
project.description: Claude Code Desktop GUI — Tauri 2 + Vue 3 桌面应用。为 Claude Code CLI 提供图形化桌面界面，支持 DeepSeek API 代理后端。

modules.name: 前端-聊天
modules.summary: 聊天核心界面 — 消息气泡渲染、输入栏（含工具栏和模式栏）、思考指示器、上下文用量指示器
responsibilities: 工具条（权限/深度/Ponytail模式切换）

publicApi.name: ChatPanel
publicApi.signature: defineProps<{ activeSessionId?: string }>() 聊天主面板，组合 MessageBubble + InputBar + ModeBar 等

publicApi.name: MessageBubble
publicApi.signature: defineProps<{ message: Message; isLast: boolean }>() 单条消息气泡，支持 Markdown/Mermaid 渲染、思考折叠、工具调用展示、编辑/回滚操作

publicApi.name: InputBar
publicApi.signature: defineProps<{ sessionId?: string; isProcessing: boolean; autoMode: boolean }>() + defineEmits<{ send: [text: string, files?: AttachedFile[]] }>() 输入栏主组件，支持文本输入、文件附着、发送/停止

publicApi.name: InputBarToolbar
publicApi.signature: defineProps<{ planMode: boolean; autoMode: boolean; permissionMode: string; effort: string; ponytailMode: string; claudePath: string }>() + defineEmits 工具栏：计划模式/自动模式/权限/深度/Ponytail 切换

publicApi.name: ModeBar
publicApi.signature: defineProps<{ planMode: boolean; autoMode: boolean; permissionMode: string; effort: string; model?: string; isProcessing: boolean }>() + defineEmits 模式栏快捷切换

publicApi.name: ThinkingIndicator
publicApi.signature: 无Props，纯视觉组件。AI思考中时显示动画指示器

publicApi.name: ContextIndicator
publicApi.signature: defineProps<{ inputTokens: number; outputTokens: number; costUSD: number }>() + defineEmits<{ openModal: [] }>() Token用量指示条，点击打开ContextUsageModal

modules.name: 前端-布局
modules.summary: AppShell — 全局应用外壳，包含侧栏、导航栏、全局键盘快捷键绑定
responsibilities: 全局键盘快捷键（Ctrl+N新会话、Ctrl+K命令面板、Ctrl+E导出、Ctrl+Alt+T主题切换等）

publicApi.name: AppShell
publicApi.signature: 无Props。全局布局容器，组合 SessionSidebar + NavBar + router-view

modules.name: 前端-会话侧栏
modules.summary: SessionSidebar — 会话列表侧栏，展示所有会话、支持创建/重命名/删除操作
responsibilities: 新建/切换/重命名/删除会话

publicApi.name: SessionSidebar
publicApi.signature: defineProps<{ activeSessionId: string }>() + defineEmits<{ select: [id: string] }>() 会话侧边栏

modules.name: 前端-文件
modules.summary: 文件浏览与 diff 对比 — FilePanel 面板、FileTree 目录树、FilePreview 预览、DiffViewer 差异对比
responsibilities: 文本/图片/二进制文件预览

publicApi.name: FilePanel
publicApi.signature: defineProps<{ workspaceRoot: string }>() 文件浏览面板，组合 FileTree + FilePreview

publicApi.name: FileTree
publicApi.signature: defineProps<{ rootPath: string; depth: number }>() + defineEmits<{ selectFile: [path: string] }>() 递归目录树组件

publicApi.name: FilePreview
publicApi.signature: defineProps<{ path: string; filename: string; content: string; thumbnail: string | null }>() 文件内容预览（自动检测类型）

publicApi.name: DiffViewer
publicApi.signature: defineProps<{ oldStr: string; newStr: string }>() 行级差异对比（diff 库）

modules.name: 前端-设置
modules.summary: SettingsPanel — API配置界面，包含 Key/Base URL/Model 配置及连接测试

publicApi.name: SettingsPanel
publicApi.signature: 无Props。API配置面板 + 连接测试按钮

modules.name: 前端-共享
modules.summary: 共享 UI 组件 — ManagePanel 8合1管理面板、Markdown/Mermaid 渲染器、命令面板、模态框外壳、上下文用量弹窗、错误边界、文件预览弹窗
responsibilities: 命令面板（Ctrl+K 拼音搜索）

publicApi.name: ManagePanel
publicApi.signature: defineProps<{ visible: boolean }>() + defineEmits<{ close: [] }>() 8合1管理面板，Tab切换管理所有 CC 配置

publicApi.name: MarkdownRenderer
publicApi.signature: defineProps<{ content: string; isStreaming: boolean }>() Markdown 渲染组件

publicApi.name: MermaidRenderer
publicApi.signature: defineProps<{ code: string }>() Mermaid 图表渲染

publicApi.name: CommandPalette
publicApi.signature: 无Props。命令面板（Ctrl+K 触发），支持拼音搜索和最近使用

publicApi.name: ModalShell
publicApi.signature: defineProps<{ visible: boolean; title: string; widthClass: string }>() + defineEmits<{ close: [] }>() 三段式弹窗外壳（#header / default / #footer）

publicApi.name: ContextUsageModal
publicApi.signature: defineProps<{ visible: boolean }>() + defineEmits<{ close: [] }>() Token/费用用量详情弹窗

publicApi.name: ErrorBoundary
publicApi.signature: defineProps<{ fallback?: string }>() Vue errorBoundary 捕获子组件渲染错误

publicApi.name: FilePreviewModal
publicApi.signature: defineProps<{ visible: boolean; path: string; filename: string }>() + defineEmits<{ close: [] }>() 文件预览弹窗

modules.name: 前端-组合式函数
modules.summary: Vue 3 Composables — 流处理、命令注册/面板、新会话、文件预览、调试日志、代码高亮
responsibilities: 命令面板动态注册与调用

publicApi.name: useStreamProcessor
publicApi.signature: () => { startListening, stopListening } 注册 Tauri 事件监听（stream-event/stream-debug/stream-error/session-created/process-exited），事件去重后转入 chat store

publicApi.name: connectedMcpServers
publicApi.signature: Ref<string[]> MCP 服务器连接状态（由 session-created 事件更新）

publicApi.name: useCommandRegistry
publicApi.signature: () => { register, getCommands, registry } 命令注册系统，组件 onMounted 注册 → onUnmounted 注销

publicApi.name: useCommandPaletteBus
publicApi.signature: () => { trigger, open } 命令面板事件总线（打开信号）

publicApi.name: emitChatCommand
publicApi.signature: (action: string) => void 发送聊天命令到 ChatPanel

publicApi.name: useChatCommandBus
publicApi.signature: () => { chatCommand } ChatPanel 监听聊天命令

publicApi.name: useNewSession
publicApi.signature: () => { handleNew } 新建会话流程（创建→清空消息→清空日志→跳转/chat）

publicApi.name: useFilePreview
publicApi.signature: () => { getThumbnail, thumbnails } 图片缩略图缓存（base64），支持 isImageFile / mimeType 工具函数

publicApi.name: useDebugLog
publicApi.signature: () => { entries, add, clear } 调试日志收集，监听 stream-debug 事件

publicApi.name: useHighlight
publicApi.signature: () => { highlighted, highlight } highlight.js 代码高亮异步函数

modules.name: 前端-Store
modules.summary: Pinia 状态管理 — chat（消息流/工具调用/控制请求）、session（会话列表/CRUD）、settings（API配置/UI偏好/字号/主题/语言）
responsibilities: 消息状态管理（流式追加、去重、编辑、回滚、导出）

publicApi.name: useChatStore
publicApi.signature: defineStore('chat', () => { messages, currentAssistantMsg, isProcessing, pendingControlRequest, usedAgents, addUserMessage, startAssistantMessage, appendText, appendThinking, addToolUse, addControlRequest, resolveControlRequest, finishAssistantMessage, clearMessages, loadMessages, updateMessage, truncateFromIndex, truncateAfterMessage, exportMarkdown })

publicApi.name: useSessionStore
publicApi.signature: defineStore('session', () => { sessions, activeSessionId, loadSessions, createSession, setActiveSession, renameSession, deleteSession, setClaudeSessionId, getActiveClaudeSessionId })

publicApi.name: useSettingsStore
publicApi.signature: defineStore('settings', () => { apiKey, baseUrl, model, planMode, autoMode, permissionMode, effort, ponytailMode, theme, locale, fontSize, claudePath, resolvedClaudePath })

fields.name: cc-gui-ui-settings
fields.defaultValue: { planMode:false, autoMode:true, permissionMode:'bypassPermissions', effort:'high', ponytailMode:'full', theme:'dark', locale:'zh', fontSize:'medium', claudePath:'' }

modules.name: 前端-Lib
modules.summary: 工具库 — Tauri IPC 桥接封装、通用工具函数、拼音搜索、Tauri Mock
responsibilities: 封装所有 invoke() 调用为类型安全函数
错误信息国际化翻译函数
前端测试用完整 Tauri API mock

publicApi.name: sendMessage
publicApi.signature: (sessionId: string, message: string, options?: SendOptions) => Promise<string> 发送消息并启动CLI进程

publicApi.name: storeClaudeSession
publicApi.signature: (ourSessionId: string, claudeSessionId: string) => Promise<void> 存储CLI会话UUID映射

publicApi.name: stopSession
publicApi.signature: (sessionId: string) => Promise<void> 停止会话进程

publicApi.name: createSession
publicApi.signature: (model?: string) => Promise<SessionData> 创建会话

publicApi.name: listSessions
publicApi.signature: () => Promise<SessionData[]> 列出所有会话

publicApi.name: deleteSession
publicApi.signature: (sessionId: string) => Promise<void> 删除会话

publicApi.name: renameSession
publicApi.signature: (sessionId: string, title: string) => Promise<void> 重命名会话

publicApi.name: listMessages
publicApi.signature: (sessionId: string) => Promise<MessageData[]> 列出会话消息

publicApi.name: saveMessage
publicApi.signature: (id, sessionId, role, content, tokenUsage?) => Promise<void> 保存消息到DB

publicApi.name: updateMessageContent
publicApi.signature: (messageId, sessionId, content) => Promise<void> 更新消息内容

publicApi.name: deleteMessagesAfter
publicApi.signature: (messageId, sessionId) => Promise<number> 删除指定消息之后的所有消息

publicApi.name: connectLLM
publicApi.signature: (apiKey, baseUrl, model) => Promise<string> DeepSeek API连接测试

publicApi.name: listDir
publicApi.signature: (path: string) => Promise<FileEntry[]> 列出目录内容

publicApi.name: readFileContent
publicApi.signature: (path: string) => Promise<string> 读取文件文本

publicApi.name: readFileBase64
publicApi.signature: (path: string) => Promise<string> 读取文件base64编码

publicApi.name: getWorkspaceRoot
publicApi.signature: () => Promise<string> 获取工作区根目录

publicApi.name: writeFile
publicApi.signature: (path: string, content: string) => Promise<void> 写入文件（仅~/.claude/子树）

publicApi.name: getClaudeDir
publicApi.signature: () => Promise<string> 获取~/.claude/目录路径

publicApi.name: resolveClaudePath
publicApi.signature: () => Promise<string> 自动检测CLI路径

publicApi.name: getClaudeSettings
publicApi.signature: () => Promise<ClaudeSettings> 读取~/.claude/settings.json

publicApi.name: setClaudeSettings
publicApi.signature: (apiKey,baseUrl,model,effort,permissionMode) => Promise<void> 写入~/.claude/settings.json

publicApi.name: ensureItemDescriptions
publicApi.signature: (items, apiKey, baseUrl) => Promise<DescriptionItem[]> 翻译描述缓存

publicApi.name: generateMcpDescriptions
publicApi.signature: (names, apiKey, baseUrl) => Promise<DescriptionItem[]> 批量生成MCP中文描述

publicApi.name: formatNum
publicApi.signature: (n: number) => string 数字格式化(k/M后缀)

publicApi.name: formatTokenCount
publicApi.signature: (n: number) => string Token数量格式化

publicApi.name: translateError
publicApi.signature: (err: unknown) => { key: string; params?: Record<string,string> } Rust错误→i18n key映射

publicApi.name: toPinyinInitials
publicApi.signature: (text: string) => string 提取中文拼音首字母（覆盖3755常用汉字）

publicApi.name: TauriMock
publicApi.signature: 完整的 Tauri API mock（invoke/listen/emit），支持浏览器内E2E测试

modules.name: 前端-国际化
modules.summary: vue-i18n 中英双语翻译文件
responsibilities: 所有用户可见字符串的中英双语翻译

publicApi.name: zh.json
publicApi.signature: 中文翻译 locale 文件

publicApi.name: en.json
publicApi.signature: 英文翻译 locale 文件

modules.name: 前端-路由
modules.summary: Vue Router 路由配置 — /chat 和 /settings 两条路由

publicApi.name: router
publicApi.signature: createRouter({ history: createWebHistory(), routes: [{path:'/',redirect:'/chat'},{path:'/chat',name:'chat',component:()=>import('@/components/chat/ChatPanel.vue')},{path:'/settings',name:'settings',component:()=>import('@/components/settings/SettingsPanel.vue')}] })

modules.name: 前端-样式
modules.summary: 全局样式层 — 亮色/暗色主题变量、Tailwind CSS入口、字号rem缩放
responsibilities: CSS变量定义（暗色/亮色双主题）
data-theme/data-font-size 属性驱动主题切换

modules.name: Rust-入口
modules.summary: Rust 程序入口 — 仅调用 cc_gui::run()，Windows 下关闭控制台窗口
responsibilities: Windows release 模式下隐藏控制台窗口

publicApi.name: main
publicApi.signature: fn main() 程序入口，调用 cc_gui::run()

modules.name: Rust-Tauri命令
modules.summary: Tauri 主模块 — AppState 定义 + 30个 Tauri commands + 工具函数。是整个后端的核心编排层。
responsibilities: 项目根目录检测（dev/production 双模式）
30 个 Tauri commands（send_message/store_claude_session/connect_llm/stop_session/session CRUD/stdin/messages/文件操作/approved_scenarios/settings读写/翻译缓存/MCP描述生成）
OpenAI 兼容端点 URL 规范化（openai_base）

publicApi.name: AppState
publicApi.signature: pub struct AppState { pub db: Db, pub process_manager: Arc<Mutex<ProcessManager>>, pub stdin_manager: Arc<Mutex<StdinManager>>, pub session_manager: Arc<Mutex<SessionManager>> } Tauri 托管状态

publicApi.name: send_message
publicApi.signature: async fn send_message(state, session_id, message, plan_mode, auto_mode, permission_mode, effort, ultracode, model, file_paths, claude_path, app_handle) -> Result<String, String> 核心发送命令，保存用户消息→spawn CLI→注册进程

publicApi.name: connect_llm
publicApi.signature: async fn connect_llm(state, api_key, base_url, model) -> Result<String, String> DeepSeek API 连接测试

publicApi.name: stop_session
publicApi.signature: async fn stop_session(state, session_id) -> Result<(), String> 终止CLI进程并更新状态

publicApi.name: create_session
publicApi.signature: async fn create_session(state, model?) -> Result<Session, String> 创建会话

publicApi.name: list_sessions
publicApi.signature: async fn list_sessions(state) -> Result<Vec<Session>, String> 列出会话

publicApi.name: delete_session
publicApi.signature: async fn delete_session(state, session_id) -> Result<(), String> 删除会话

publicApi.name: rename_session
publicApi.signature: async fn rename_session(state, session_id, title) -> Result<(), String> 重命名会话

publicApi.name: get_session
publicApi.signature: async fn get_session(state, session_id) -> Result<Session, String> 获取单个会话

publicApi.name: send_stdin
publicApi.signature: async fn send_stdin(state, session_id, data) -> Result<(), String> 向CLI进程标准输入写入数据

publicApi.name: add_approved_scenario
publicApi.signature: async fn add_approved_scenario(state, tool_name, pattern) -> Result<(), String> 添加批准场景

publicApi.name: remove_approved_scenario
publicApi.signature: async fn remove_approved_scenario(state, tool_name, pattern) -> Result<(), String> 移除批准场景

publicApi.name: list_approved_scenarios
publicApi.signature: async fn list_approved_scenarios(state) -> Result<Vec<(String,String)>, String> 列出批准场景

publicApi.name: save_message
publicApi.signature: async fn save_message(state, id, session_id, role, content, token_usage?) -> Result<(), String> 保存消息到DB

publicApi.name: update_message_content
publicApi.signature: async fn update_message_content(state, message_id, session_id, content) -> Result<(), String> 更新消息内容

publicApi.name: delete_messages_after
publicApi.signature: async fn delete_messages_after(state, message_id, session_id) -> Result<u32, String> 删除指定消息之后的所有消息

publicApi.name: list_messages
publicApi.signature: async fn list_messages(state, session_id) -> Result<Vec<Message>, String> 列出会话消息

publicApi.name: list_dir
publicApi.signature: async fn list_dir(path) -> Result<Vec<FileEntry>, String> 列出目录

publicApi.name: read_file_content
publicApi.signature: async fn read_file_content(path) -> Result<String, String> 读取文件内容

publicApi.name: read_file_base64
publicApi.signature: async fn read_file_base64(path) -> Result<String, String> 读取文件base64

publicApi.name: get_workspace_root
publicApi.signature: async fn get_workspace_root() -> Result<String, String> 获取工作区根目录

publicApi.name: reveal_in_explorer
publicApi.signature: async fn reveal_in_explorer(path) -> Result<(), String> 在文件管理器中显示

publicApi.name: write_file
publicApi.signature: async fn write_file(path, content) -> Result<(), String> 安全写入文件（仅~/.claude/子树）

publicApi.name: get_claude_dir
publicApi.signature: async fn get_claude_dir() -> Result<String, String> 获取~/.claude/路径

publicApi.name: resolve_claude_path
publicApi.signature: fn resolve_claude_path() -> Result<String, String> CLI路径自动检测

publicApi.name: get_claude_settings
publicApi.signature: fn get_claude_settings() -> Result<ClaudeSettings, String> 读取~/.claude/settings.json

publicApi.name: set_claude_settings
publicApi.signature: fn set_claude_settings(api_key, base_url, model, effort, permission_mode) -> Result<(), String> 写入~/.claude/settings.json

publicApi.name: ensure_item_descriptions
publicApi.signature: async fn ensure_item_descriptions(state, items, api_key, base_url) -> Result<Vec<DescriptionItem>, String> 翻译描述缓存（DB缓存+API翻译）

publicApi.name: generate_mcp_descriptions
publicApi.signature: async fn generate_mcp_descriptions(state, names, api_key, base_url) -> Result<Vec<DescriptionItem>, String> 批量生成MCP中文描述

publicApi.name: clear_item_descriptions
publicApi.signature: fn clear_item_descriptions(state) -> Result<(), String> 清空翻译缓存

publicApi.name: clear_mcp_descriptions
publicApi.signature: fn clear_mcp_descriptions(state) -> Result<(), String> 清空MCP描述缓存

publicApi.name: get_auto_mode_status
publicApi.signature: async fn get_auto_mode_status() -> Result<bool, String> 检查auto模式状态

publicApi.name: detect_project_root
publicApi.signature: fn detect_project_root() -> String 项目根目录检测（dev/production双模式）

publicApi.name: subagent_model
publicApi.signature: fn subagent_model() -> String 读取CLAUDE_CODE_SUBAGENT_MODEL环境变量，fallback deepseek-chat

publicApi.name: openai_base
publicApi.signature: fn openai_base(base_url: &str) -> String 规范化OpenAI兼容端点URL（去除/anthropic和/v1后缀）

publicApi.name: translate_to_chinese
publicApi.signature: async fn translate_to_chinese(api_key, base_url, text) -> Result<String, String> 调用DeepSeek API翻译描述

fields.name: CLAUDE_CODE_SUBAGENT_MODEL
fields.description: 子代理/翻译用模型（通过~/.claude/settings.json的env字段配置）

modules.name: Rust-进程管理
modules.summary: 三线程进程模型 — 基于 TOKENICODE 架构。Waiter（进程生命周期）、Stdout Reader（NDJSON解析→Tauri事件）、Stderr Reader（错误转发）。
responsibilities: 三线程模型：Waiter / Stdout Reader / Stderr Reader
CLI路径自动检测（native → npm global → PATH）
权限模式同步（auto→settings.json，其他→CLI flag）

publicApi.name: ManagedProcess
publicApi.signature: pub struct ManagedProcess { pub session_id, pub pid, kill_tx, exit_notify } 托管进程句柄

publicApi.name: ProcessManager
publicApi.signature: pub struct ProcessManager { processes: HashMap<String, Arc<Mutex<ManagedProcess>>> } 进程注册表

publicApi.name: ProcessManager::new
publicApi.signature: pub fn new() -> Self 新建进程管理器

publicApi.name: ProcessManager::register
publicApi.signature: pub fn register(&mut self, id, process) 注册进程

publicApi.name: ProcessManager::get
publicApi.signature: pub fn get(&self, id) -> Option<Arc<Mutex<ManagedProcess>>> 获取进程

publicApi.name: ProcessManager::kill
publicApi.signature: pub async fn kill(&self, id) -> Result<(), String> 优雅终止进程（5秒超时）

publicApi.name: StdinManager
publicApi.signature: pub struct StdinManager { handles: HashMap<String, ChildStdin> } 标准输入管理器

publicApi.name: StdinManager::new
publicApi.signature: pub fn new() -> Self 新建stdin管理器

publicApi.name: StdinManager::register
publicApi.signature: pub fn register(&mut self, id, stdin) 注册stdin句柄

publicApi.name: StdinManager::send
publicApi.signature: pub async fn send(&mut self, id, data) -> Result<(), String> 发送stdin数据

publicApi.name: StdinManager::remove
publicApi.signature: pub fn remove(&mut self, id) 移除stdin句柄

publicApi.name: find_claude
publicApi.signature: pub fn find_claude() -> Option<String> CLI路径自动检测（3级：native→npm→PATH）

publicApi.name: SpawnParams
publicApi.signature: pub struct SpawnParams { session_id, message, resume_id, plan_mode, auto_mode, permission_mode, effort, ultracode, cwd, model, file_paths, claude_path } 启动参数

publicApi.name: ProcessExitedEvent
publicApi.signature: pub struct ProcessExitedEvent { session_id, exit_code, success } 进程退出事件

publicApi.name: spawn_claude_session
publicApi.signature: pub async fn spawn_claude_session(params, app_handle, stdin_manager, session_manager) -> Result<Arc<Mutex<ManagedProcess>>, String> 主spawn函数：构建CLI参数→启动进程→创建三线程→返回ManagedProcess

publicApi.name: sync_permission_settings
publicApi.signature: fn sync_permission_settings(auto_mode, plan_mode, permission_mode) -> Result<(), String> 同步权限模式到~/.claude/settings.json

modules.name: Rust-协议解析
modules.summary: Claude Code CLI stream-json 的 NDJSON 协议解析 — StreamEvent枚举（system/assistant/user/result/control_request）、ContentBlock枚举（text/thinking/tool_use）、StreamLine解析器、StreamFrontendEvent转前端事件

publicApi.name: StreamEvent
publicApi.signature: pub enum StreamEvent { System{subtype,data}, Assistant{message,session_id,parent_tool_use_id,extra}, User{message,session_id,parent_tool_use_id,extra}, Result{subtype,result,num_turns,total_cost_usd,duration_ms,extra} } CLI stream-json事件枚举

publicApi.name: AssistantMessage
publicApi.signature: pub struct AssistantMessage { content: Vec<ContentBlock>, model, stop_reason, stop_sequence, id } 助手消息

publicApi.name: ContentBlock
publicApi.signature: pub enum ContentBlock { Text{text}, Thinking{thinking}, ToolUse{id,name,input} } 内容块枚举

publicApi.name: UserMessage
publicApi.signature: pub struct UserMessage { content: Vec<UserContentBlock>, parent_tool_use_id } 用户消息

publicApi.name: UserContentBlock
publicApi.signature: pub enum UserContentBlock { ToolResult{tool_use_id,content,is_error} } 用户内容块

publicApi.name: StreamLine
publicApi.signature: pub struct StreamLine { inner: Value } NDJSON行解析器

publicApi.name: StreamLine::parse
publicApi.signature: pub fn parse(line: &str) -> Option<Self> 解析NDJSON行

publicApi.name: StreamLine::capture_session_id
publicApi.signature: pub fn capture_session_id(&self) -> Option<String> 提取system/init事件的session_id

publicApi.name: StreamLine::capture_mcp_servers
publicApi.signature: pub fn capture_mcp_servers(&self) -> Vec<String> 提取system/init事件的MCP服务器列表（原生mcp_servers字段优先，fallback解析mcp__前缀tool名）

publicApi.name: StreamLine::to_frontend_event
publicApi.signature: pub fn to_frontend_event(&self, session_id) -> StreamFrontendEvent 转换为前端事件（处理stream_event增量/assistant完整/result终态/control_request审批）

publicApi.name: StreamFrontendEvent
publicApi.signature: pub struct StreamFrontendEvent { event_type, session_id, text, thinking, tool_use, control_request, is_final, error, duration_ms, input_tokens, output_tokens, cost_usd } 前端事件结构

publicApi.name: ControlRequest
publicApi.signature: pub struct ControlRequest { subtype, tool_name, tool_input } CLI控制请求（工具审批）

modules.name: Rust-会话管理
modules.summary: SessionManager — SQLite 背书的会话CRUD、消息持久化、DeepSeek API连接测试、审批场景管理
responsibilities: 会话CRUD（创建/列出/获取/删除/重命名）
消息持久化（保存/列出/更新/截断）
自动标题（首条用户消息前50字符）

publicApi.name: Session
publicApi.signature: pub struct Session { id, title, cli_session_id, cwd, model, status, created_at, updated_at, message_count, total_tokens, total_cost } 会话数据

publicApi.name: Message
publicApi.signature: pub struct Message { id, session_id, role, content(JSON), token_usage, created_at } 消息数据

publicApi.name: SessionManager
publicApi.signature: pub struct SessionManager { db: Db } 会话管理器

publicApi.name: SessionManager::new
publicApi.signature: pub fn new(db: Db) -> Self 新建会话管理器

publicApi.name: SessionManager::create_session
publicApi.signature: pub fn create_session(&self, cwd, model) -> Result<Session, String> 创建会话（UUID v4）

publicApi.name: SessionManager::get_session
publicApi.signature: pub fn get_session(&self, id) -> Result<Session, String> 获取单个会话

publicApi.name: SessionManager::list_sessions
publicApi.signature: pub fn list_sessions(&self) -> Result<Vec<Session>, String> 列出所有会话（最新优先，含Token/费用聚合）

publicApi.name: SessionManager::delete_session
publicApi.signature: pub fn delete_session(&self, id) -> Result<(), String> 删除会话（CASCADE删除消息）

publicApi.name: SessionManager::rename_session
publicApi.signature: pub fn rename_session(&self, id, title) -> Result<(), String> 重命名会话

publicApi.name: SessionManager::set_claude_session
publicApi.signature: pub fn set_claude_session(&self, our_id, claude_id) -> Result<(), String> 存储CLI会话UUID映射

publicApi.name: SessionManager::get_claude_session
publicApi.signature: pub fn get_claude_session(&self, our_id) -> Option<String> 获取CLI会话UUID（用于--resume）

publicApi.name: SessionManager::auto_title_from_first_message
publicApi.signature: pub fn auto_title_from_first_message(&self, id, message) -> Result<(), String> 自动标题（首条消息前50字符），仅在默认识别名'New Chat'时生效

publicApi.name: SessionManager::save_message
publicApi.signature: pub fn save_message(&self, id, session_id, role, content, token_usage) -> Result<(), String> 保存消息（INSERT OR REPLACE）

publicApi.name: SessionManager::list_messages
publicApi.signature: pub fn list_messages(&self, session_id) -> Result<Vec<Message>, String> 列出会话消息（按创建时间升序）

publicApi.name: SessionManager::update_message_content
publicApi.signature: pub fn update_message_content(&self, id, session_id, content) -> Result<(), String> 更新消息内容

publicApi.name: SessionManager::delete_messages_after
publicApi.signature: pub fn delete_messages_after(&self, id, session_id) -> Result<u32, String> 删除指定消息之后的所有消息（回滚实现）

publicApi.name: SessionManager::set_session_status
publicApi.signature: pub fn set_session_status(&self, id, status) -> Result<(), String> 更新会话状态

publicApi.name: SessionManager::test_connection
publicApi.signature: pub async fn test_connection(&self, api_key, base_url, model) -> Result<String, String> DeepSeek API连接测试

publicApi.name: SessionManager::add_approved_scenario
publicApi.signature: pub fn add_approved_scenario(&self, tool_name, pattern) -> Result<(), String> 添加审批场景

publicApi.name: SessionManager::remove_approved_scenario
publicApi.signature: pub fn remove_approved_scenario(&self, tool_name, pattern) -> Result<(), String> 移除审批场景

publicApi.name: SessionManager::is_approved
publicApi.signature: pub fn is_approved(&self, tool_name, input_summary) -> bool 检查工具是否已批准

publicApi.name: SessionManager::list_approved_scenarios
publicApi.signature: pub fn list_approved_scenarios(&self) -> Result<Vec<(String,String)>, String> 列出所有审批场景

modules.name: Rust-数据库
modules.summary: SQLite 初始化与迁移 — WAL模式、5张表（sessions/messages/settings/approved_scenarios/item_descriptions）、3个索引
responsibilities: 数据库目录管理（跨平台：%APPDATA%/cc-gui / ~/.local/share/cc-gui / ~/Library/Application Support/cc-gui）

publicApi.name: Db
publicApi.signature: pub struct Db { pub conn: Arc<Mutex<Connection>> } 线程安全数据库句柄

publicApi.name: Db::new
publicApi.signature: pub fn new() -> SqliteResult<Self> 创建数据库连接并运行迁移

publicApi.name: db_dir
publicApi.signature: pub fn db_dir() -> PathBuf 获取数据库目录（跨平台）

publicApi.name: db_path
publicApi.signature: pub fn db_path() -> PathBuf 获取数据库文件路径

publicApi.name: open_db
publicApi.signature: pub fn open_db() -> SqliteResult<Connection> 打开/创建数据库+迁移
